types: A smuggler’s crate containing Iron Fang Consortium relics has vanished from the Markets Infinite—track it before the Serpent Choir claims it.
Locate the missing heir of a fallen merchant house in the Sanctum Quarter, who’s been sighted whispering to Patchwork Saints in the Warrens.
Sabotage a rival faction’s supply shipment en route to the Outer Wall, ensuring it never reaches the Obsidian Lotus’s hands.
Retrieve a cursed artifact from the ruins of a collapsed Guild Spires archive, guarded by a spirit bound to the Glass Sigil’s secrets.
Escort a disgraced Adventurer Guild member through the Grand Forum, avoiding both the Tower Authority’s eyes and the Argent Blades’ debts.
Blackmail a high-ranking Serpent Choir official with stolen divine contracts, ensuring their silence before the next divine edict is announced.
Recover a stolen Kharma ledger from the Guild of Ashen Scrolls’ vaults, or risk being marked as a heretic by the Wizards Tower.
Find and bring back a失踪的 arena gladiator from the Warrens, whose victory could tip the balance of the Argent Blades’ upcoming bloodmatch.
Discreetly deliver a vial of sacred ash from the Patchwork Saints’ Warrens sanctum to a desperate cultist in the Markets Infinite.
Uncover the truth behind a series of mysterious disappearances in the Outer Wall, linked to a forbidden trade route between the Obsidian Lotus and the Glass Sigil.
